name: Anomaly Explainer

data.dsp_query: SELECT * FROM public.sales_anomalies WHERE object_id = $1 ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 5

prompt_template:
Explain the anomalies for {{ dsp_data[0].object_id if dsp_data else 'this object' }} in plain language.

Data:
{{ dsp_data | tojson }}

Return JSON { explanation: string, suspected_causes: string[], severity: one of ('info','warn','critical'), headline: string, body: string }.
